feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to delete failed archiving files of the MM_ACCTIT object? (SARA tcode)
entry.content:
Hello dears,

We are having a slowdown in the archive selection operation at the time of deletion because there are several unsuccessful write files in the system.
We do not need to physically delete records from the system, but we would just like to delete these unsuccessful archive files (which are inconsistent since the records were deleted by other write and delete operations).

Does anyone know how to do this?

Thanks in advance.

Silvia

entry.title: Can you help me how to fetch opening balance with bincode wise for sap business one query
Table Partition for S063
entry.content:
According to our PERSON_NAME, we have a table S063 that should be partitioned.
This has to be done in both our R3D, R3Q and R3P systems.
Largest Non-partitioned Column Tables (Records)

The number of records in column-based table partitions may become critical.

The table below shows the largest non-partitioned column tables in terms of the number of records.
Largest Non-partitioned Column Tables According To Records
Schema Name
Table Name
Records (Total)
Rating
2 Billion Records App
SAPABAP1
S063
IP_ADDRESS


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: HANA Memory usage alert when it is reaches 80% of capacity SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Is there any possibility to set up SAP B1 HANA memory usage alert with email trigger once the utilized HANA memory usage reaches 80%?

Such that sudden outage of SAP SAP B1 HANA Services can be avoided as a precaution.

 

Best regards

Anand

SAP HANA SAP HANA, platform edition  SAP HANA studio SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA

entry.title: Down payment clearing
entry.content: Please suggest what will be the solution for automatic vendor line item clearing along with down payment through transaction code MIRO.

entry.title: OBY6 Forex rate settings
entry.content:
Hi All,

I had a question about configuration of company in OBY6 regarding the option of "No exch. Rate diff. when clearing in LC". How does this work exactly?

Hypothetical example of document in foreign currency being cleared in LC:

Company A in India imports goods worth 1,000 USD when exchange rate is 1 USD=80 INR. AP would be posted at INR 80,000.

At the time of payment if the rate changes to 1 USD = 85 INR, 85,000 INR would be required to clear the invoice, leading to an exchange loss of 5,000 INR. 

If the above option in OBY6 is enabled, will this exchange loss not be posted? If so, why would this be required as it is against GAAP requirements.

Thank you!

entry.title: TLS/SSL configuration on both the server and the client.
entry.content:
We have the below requirement on the SSL/TLS and client and database traffic encryption in HANA as described below.

1. To use protocol to secure communication between the SAP PERSON_NAME database and clients tat access the SQL interface of the database, TLS/SSL must be configured on both the server and the client.

2. client and database traffic encryption.

Can you please guide us how to enable client and database traffic encryption. and TLS/SSL configuration in  both the server and the client.
Please share us in case any relevant documents are available 

Thanks and best regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: International Version Address
entry.content:
Please help to clarify below:

I maintain an international language for a plant code (OX10) - let's consider plant 0001 with English (EN) and Chinese (CN) address versions. This results in my plant appearing twice in the MB51 filter, once for each language. How can I address this issue and ensure that only one line is displayed in MB51, given that the data for both filters is identical?

Beside, what will be the impact if I have the CN address removed?

entry.title: Adobe form does not display decimals ,00
entry.content:
Hi,

Struggling with decimal comma issue.

I am adding together the first 2 values below – resulting in the last value, but it is dropping a zero:

I then format this field:

But it then rounds up the value and drops all decimals:

Please note that I am working in a 2 tier SAP S4 HANA public edition i.e. no development tier.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Hana Cloud Certification soon dissapear, why?
entry.content:
Hello, recently i saw that HANA CLOUD certifications will dissappear soon in March, any idea why?
How it will be in the future? 

Thank you,

Best regards,

Ghenadie

entry.title: listing for BOM component items
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Need of your help for BOM listing components.

BOM header material listing is checked by the SAP standard function, we need the exit program that will check all BOM components material listing. We have to activate listing for BOM components. what is the Exit program for it?

And also, our requirement is that If any material is not listed then the program will return the error message and fail the sales order entry. 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Execution Reverse a sales document related to a SO not migrated
entry.content:
Hello all,

When trying to reverse a migrated document through FBR2, i'm getting an error which says :  Order XXXX cannot carry revenues. i've tried so many orders to see but still getting the same error.

Could you please tell what should i do or if there's any other way to reverse the document?

 

Thank you

entry.title: SAP HANA Database Revision upgrade in HANA SYSTEM Replication Architecture - Standard Approach
entry.content:
Could you please suggest on the Below Process.

1. can we perform SAP HANA Database Update from version 2.00.055.00.1615413201 to 2.00.059.11.1700553860 on  Node2 - HA (Secondary) and Node3 - DR (Secondary) prior to doing on Node1 - Primary ?
2. will the SAP Hana System Replication works if the SAP database Revision versions are different 
    I mean Secondary's are version 2.00.055.00.1615413201 and Primary is higher rev version 2.00.059.11.1700553860
    
Please confirm the Best Standard Approach that can be followed when doing SAP HANA Database Revision upgrade in HANA SYSTEM Replication Architecture    


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Error creating sap hana trigger
entry.content:
When trying to create an audit trigger for a SAP Hana table, I get the following error:

 

 

SQL Error [1287] [HY000]: SAP DBTech JDBC: [1287] (at 596): identifier must be declared: NEW: line 14 col 13 (at pos 596)

 

 

The code I am using is:

 

 

CREATE TRIGGER AUDIT_PRECIOS_INSERT
AFTER INSERT ON "ASWAP_DBPRUEBAS_AT2"."LISTAS_PRECIOS"
FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    DECLARE cliente_host NVARCHAR(256);
    DECLARE cliente_ip VARCHAR(45);
    DECLARE usuario NVARCHAR(256);
    
    SELECT "CLIENT_HOST", "CLIENT_IP", "USER_NAME" INTO cliente_host, cliente_ip, usuario
    FROM "M_CONNECTIONS"
    WHERE "CONNECTION_ID" = CURRENT_CONNECTION;
    
    INSERT INTO "ASWAP_DBPRUEBAS_AT2"."LISTAS_PRECIOS_AUDIT" ("ItemCode", "Cod_Lista_Precio", "Nuevo_Precio", "Fecha", "Usuario_App", "Cliente_Host", "Cliente_IP", "User_Name")
    VALUES (:NEW."ItemCode", :NEW."Cod_Lista_Precio", :NEW."Precio", CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, usuario, cliente_host, cliente_ip, usuario);
END;

entry.title: PayableLineItemPaymentTerms_In
entry.content:
Hi, I am looking for a working example of the below API to update the CD amount for the FI document for the supplier invoice. Can anyone help?

Journal Entry - Update Discount Information

entry.title: Rule to be implemented on blocking deliveries and issues of goods linked to a released order (OVA8 c
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a need, when unblocking orders blocked due to exceeding the credit limit (VKM4), we have noticed that deliveries and the issue of goods are sometimes blocked, we want to prevent the blocking of deliveries and issue of goods , if the amount and quantity of the goods on the delivery or issue of goods is less than that of the order (whatever the deviation as long as it is less than the order amount), and then the tolerance on the amount of the order released?.

 

Thanks a lot

entry.title: Crystal Report assigned Users Branches
entry.content:
Hi Everyone.

Is there any way to have a parameter in my Crystal Report filtered with branches assigned to users? I want to get values list down branch base on users login.

I am using the following query but brings empty the dropdown.

Code3@SELECT T1."BPLId", T0."BPLName" FROM OBPL T0 INNER JOIN USR6 T1 ON T0."BPLId" = T1."BPLId" INNER JOIN OUSR T2 ON T1."UserID"=T2."USERID" WHERE T2."U_NAME"= '@printbyusername'

I try crystal report 2016 and SAP Business One V10.2208

SAP Crystal ReportsSAP Business One, version for SAP HANA

entry.title: Disable HANA System Replication to have a second node to another Standard Hana install
entry.content:
Hi,

Nowadays we have a PERSON_NAME System Repplication from Host A to Host B.

We have plans to STOP the System Repplication and we would like to have 2 PERSON_NAME DB install, on Host A and also on Host B.

We would like to have to PERSON_NAME DB.

How can we do it ? We do not like to have Backup/Restore because ther servers are not in the same LAN.

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Semifinish goods sales order
entry.content:
Hi all,

we have found that material type Semifinish good sales order is not displayed in Monitor Material Coverage or MD04.

Issue is that field VBAP-BEDAE is not automatically fulfilled(for RAW materials or Finish goods its automatically fulfilled).

Could you please advice how to setup these kind of materials to have it fulfilled without any manual input?

Thank you

#SAP HANA CLOUD

entry.title: Sending attachment from document to mail with Service Layer
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

We have some questions about sending attachments with Service Layer (B1 V10.0 PL02).

Our goal is to create a signed PDF document, attach it to a delivery document, and send it to BP's contact E-Mail. Signing document, attaching it to the delivery document and get the e-mail address is done, but sending it is the problem.

Our first approach was to read the document attachment2 object, get the path of the file, and create a new attachment to use it with the message object. We can get the path from SAP General Params ("parametrizaciones generales", we are using spanish language), then we realized that user can have it's own Attachments Path via "Valores propuestos", but we learned that this can be changed and documents can have a totally different attachment path, so we need the path from attachment object.

We tried to get the path of the file using http://192.168.1.193:50001/b1s/v1/Attachments2(xx) with Service Layer, but the source path we get is the "srcPath" from ATC1 table, we need the "trgtPath" of that table, because the file was deleted from temp path once it has been attached.

So, Delivery document doesn't have document path, Service Layer's attachment2 return a not valid one, and Service Layer can't access to ATC1 table without making a view in database. Is there a simple way to get that path?

Second question. We've thinking to get the delivery document attachment id, and use it with the message object directly. Can we do that, and forget about getting attachment info and doing a copy of it, just for send an e-mail? Could be some issue if the document attachment is edited (like adding another file, or deleting previous)?

We could like to try the first approach, because then we can filter what documents we want to send, but making a view just for this, or using http://192.168.1.193:50001/b1s/v1/Attachments2(xx)/$value to get the file (as a stream) and save it again looks too elaborated. Can you give us some suggestions?

Thank you!
